usage: create_ccopt_flexible_htree [-help] [-adjust_sink_grid_for_aspect_ratio <string>] [-auto_sinks_sink_area <string>] [-final_cell <libCell/ptnCell>] [-image_directory <string>] -name <string> [-partition_boundary_polarity {non_inverting inverting ignore}] -pin <instTerm|term|hInstTerm>+ [-sink_grid_box <string>] [-sink_grid_exclusion_zones {string1 string2 ...}] [-sink_grid_sink_area <string>] {[-sinks {string1 string2 ...}] [-sink_grid <string>] [-auto_sinks <string>]} [ -layer_density <float> ] [ -hv_balance <string> ] [ -inverting ] [ -omit_symmetry <string> ] [ -power_weight <float> ] [ -stop_at_sdc_clock_roots ] [ -sinks {string1 string2 ...} ] [ -max_driver_distance <string> [ -max_root_distance <string> ]] [ -partition_groups <string> ]  [ -sink_instance_prefix <string> ] [ -mode <string> ] [-trunk_cell <libCell/ptnCell> ] [-sinks {string1 string2 ...} | -auto_sinks <string>] [ -sink_grid <string> | -auto_sinks <string>] [-hv_balance <string> ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -adjust_sink_grid_for_aspect_ratio
options.description: <string> If true adjust the sink grid for the aspect ratio of the sink grid box (if specified) or floorplan

options.name: -auto_sinks
options.description: Specifies the number of sink rectangles per partition hinst and top-level.

options.name: -auto_sinks_sink_area
options.description: Approximate size of the rectangle describing the initial width and height of automatically computed sink rectangles {width height}

options.name: -final_cell
options.description: Library cell to use for the H-tree sinks (must be buffer or inverter) ((libCell/ptnCell), optional)

options.name: -hv_balance
options.description: Specifies whether horizontal and vertical wires can only be balanced against other wires of the same orientation (true, default), or whether any wire can be balanced against any other wire (false)

options.name: -image_directory
options.description: Name of the directory to which images are written

options.name: -inverting
options.description: Specifies whether the tree will invert its input

options.name: -layer_density
options.description: In DRV mode, the assumed layer density used to compute the parasitics for timing estimates of H-tree nets during H-tree synthesis based on the non default rule for top nets (default 1.0)

options.name: -max_driver_distance
options.description: In distance mode, the maximum length of the nets connecting H-tree drivers.

options.name: -max_root_distance
options.description: In distance mode, maximum length of the net connecting the root and the first driver of the H-tree.

options.name: -mode
options.description: Specifies the driver insertion mode (default 'drv')

options.name: -name
options.description: Name of the flexible H-tree

options.name: -omit_symmetry
options.description: Omit the creation of symmetry drivers and/or branches to balance the H-tree

options.name: -partition_boundary_polarity
options.description: {non_inverting inverting ignore} The polarity of the clock signal with regard to the source when entering partitions

options.name: -partition_groups
options.description: The groups in which partition are clustered in channelless designs. Nested lists imply allowed crossings between groups.

options.name: -pin
options.description: Output pin or port under which the H-tree is created ((instTerm|term|hInstTerm)+, required)

options.name: -power_weight
options.description: Specifies the power weight (default 1.0)

options.name: -sink_grid
options.description: Specifies the columns and rows of a grid of H-tree sinks {columns rows}, where the columns and rows may be swapped if -adjust_sink_grid_for_aspect_ratio is true.

options.name: -sink_grid_box
options.description: Box describing the area that the grid of H-tree sinks should cover {xmin ymin xmax ymax}

options.name: -sink_grid_exclusion_zones
options.description: {string1 string2 ...} Boxes describing zones that should not be covered by the grid of H-tree sinks. list {xmin ymin xmax ymax}

options.name: -sink_grid_sink_area
options.description: Approximate size of the rectangle describing valid locations for final cells (given by -final_cell) per H-tree sink in the grid {width height}

options.name: -sink_instance_prefix
options.description: Prefix used for inst names of final cells (given by -final_cell) of H-tree sinks

options.name: -sinks
options.description: Specifies H-tree sinks as approximate rectangular areas for locations of final cells (given by -final_cell), or pins to wire to. Nested lists imply clustering relationships. list of {pin | {xmin ymin xmax ymax}}

options.name: -stop_at_sdc_clock_roots
options.description: Stop searching for parts of the clock tree through SDC clock roots when defining generated clock trees for H-tree sinks

options.name: -trunk_cell
options.description: Library cell to use inside the H-tree (must be buffer or inverter) ((libCell/ptnCell), optional)
